description: A dismissible alert/notification banner for important announcements, warnings, or informational messages. Supports info, success, warning, and error variants with optional icon and close button. Use for site-wide announcements, maintenance notices, or promotional banners. Layout: full-width colored banner with icon, message text, optional link, and dismiss button.

fields.name: icon
fields.title: Icon (Lucide icon name, e.g. rocket, shield, code, users)

label: Alert Banner

test_data.message: We're launching a new feature next week! Stay tuned for exciting updates.
